meaning: adj.非农场的,与农场无关的,非农业品的
examples: Wage data for nonfarm occupations, however, are relatively abundant.
In the month of January, total nonfarm employment grew by a very disappointing 39, 000 jobs.
In addition, nonfarm rural employment is supporting larger Numbers of blacks than in the past.
January saw the biggest rise in nonfarm jobs since a 408, 000 jump in September 1997.
U.S. nonfarm payrolls added 103, 000 jobs in September, well ahead of the consensus estimate for 60, 000.
